subcodes.first_line: Be patient in misfortunes and contented under all circumstances. In truth be firm and unwavering; be quick in doing good deeds
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @firmness in the Covenant
